chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 1187 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Noor Ahmed Rabbani junior partner of Mr. Wahid Bux Aajiz Leghari, Advocate for petitioner Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. a/w SIP Mir Muhammad Rind PS New Jatoi, SIP Najam Din for SHO Tando Yousif and SIP Shafi Bangash for SSP Hyderabad The petitioner is aggrieved by the alleged harassment caused to her by respondent Nos. 1 to 4 on account of her free will marriage with one Gulzar Ali Khoso. Mr. Sher Muhammad Sehto, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent Nos. 1 to 4 and states that the private respondents, who themselves are present in court, have neither caused any harassment to the petitioner nor they intend to do so. Learned counsel for petitioner states that due protection of law be provided to the petitioner. As per claim of the petitioner, she is residing within the limits of police station Tando Yousif, therefore, SHO PS Tando Yousif is directed to provide due protection to the petitioner. SHO PS Neo Jatoi informs the court that there is one FIR bearing Crime No. 444 of 2013 registered against the husband of petitioner under Section 365-B and 452 PPC. The petitioner has stated in clear words in the court that she has not been abducted by her husband or anyone and she has contracted marriage with her husband on her own free will. In view of this statement, SHO states that he is going to record the statement of petitioner and would submit the same before the trial court for disposal of the case in accordance with law.

The petitioner has stated in clear words in the court that she has not been abducted by her husband or anyone and she has contracted marriage with her husband on her own free will. In view of this statement, SHO states that he is going to record the statement of petitioner and would submit the same before the trial court for disposal of the case in accordance with law. The petitioner’s counsel has shown satisfaction and seeks disposal of this petition. This petition in the above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
